title: Eva card game
wikitext:
[]: Eva card game             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jun 22, 2004 8:17 pm Whatever happened to that Evangelion card game? Was it ever translated into English?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 22, 2004 8:30 pm Nope. I hear it wasn't all that fun anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by GraveDigger » Wed Jul 07, 2004 12:18 pm I didnâ€™t know about the Evangelion card game. I seen a lot of card games, but I think that I herd something about Evangelion card game, but I'm not sure. But it couldn't have been that good of a game, if it didn't get to come to America, and a lot of things come from Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 5:51 pm I have seen some japaneese ones , but by the looks of it it wasnt that fun. This is the reason it never came to the wider market , it wasn't fun.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 8:19 pm an eva card game would be cool. be i bored enough i could make some cards using the MTG system

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:24 pm I've done a few cards here and there that were EVA and printed 'em off. The were like "Raging Asuka" (a 5/5 card) and EOE Unit-01 *Giant Wings of Light* which was a 7/7 with good reason :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:19 pm EVA-01X wrote: I've done a few cards here and there that were EVA and printed 'em off. The were like "Raging Asuka" (a 5/5 card) and EOE Unit-01 *Giant Wings of Light* which was a 7/7 with good reason :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:21 pm i dont have the patience

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:23 pm If any of you really want me to, I'll make an Evangelion set. Just ask.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:24 pm make it so

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:25 pm Aye aye captain. Gimme a month.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:26 pm TheMessiah wrote: make it so

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:28 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: TheMessiah wrote: make it so

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:29 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: TheMessiah wrote: make it so

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:32 pm The Captin says it at least once an episode How many cards are going to be in this deck

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:35 pm has to be at least 60 including lands

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:36 pm I'd said I would make a set. That's around 150 cards I think. Weeeee!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 10:37 pm Cool , i think that would almost cover the whole series

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:26 pm thatd cover the series and more 0.o
